reviews.review_description:
The core gameplay is simple yet engaging, making it easy to pick up and play for short bursts of entertainment. The controls are intuitive although a little fiddly with the hand tracking.
However, after a few rounds, the lack of depth becomes apparent. While the game is entertaining at first, there isn't enough variety in the modes or challenges to keep you hooked for too long.
Visually, Fingerball has a polished, clean look, and the animations are smooth, but the overall experience feels somewhat bare-bones. Adding more content as the game updates could significantly enhance the game's longevity overall its a decent casual game with a fun concept.

This game could be flicking fun, if it felt like you was making contact with the ball… as most the time you are flicking in hope it will contact… it’s kind of random if it will or won’t connect.

The graphics are nice and clean, and it’s nice how you can adjust the height of the table to suit you… whether playing standing up or sitting down.

It’s more of a leaderboard battle against other players scores.

Will be better, if they accuracy and contact with fingers is improved.

First of all I have to say graphics are really sharp, loved the colours, stadium is very pleasing on the eye.
You wear football boots on your fingers and flick to score, great sound effects.
Would love more content please, it’s a great start and very clean and polished.
Well done to the dev on this game.

reviews.review_title: Needs Work But Love The Concept
reviews.review_description: Hand tracking is very finicky but I love the concept of the game. If we were able to use controllers for more accurate kicking it would be great. Also this would be a fun multiplayer to play against friends.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the comment! 

We're constantly working on how we can improve certain aspects like the controller support and hand tracking.

Also, Multiplayer is definitely on our roadmap. 

Make sure to check for updates as we push hard to improve the game experience overall.
